events.label: assistant
events.text: Identified the condition as a missing drip loop at the service entrance — service conductors run straight into the weatherhead without a low point, creating a water-intrusion path into the meter/service equipment. Marked as `fail` / `high` risk (installed-defective, non-compliant) per NEC 230.54, with corrective actions to re-form the drip loop and reinspect. Written to `/app/answer.json`.
